name: Kokoro TTS
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); 82M parameter model; runs on CPU

performance.notes: Realtime factor >50x on GPU; ~5x on CPU — much faster than real-time

agent_readiness.notes: State-of-the-art open-source TTS with only 82M parameters. Remarkably natural voice quality comparable to ElevenLabs. Multiple voices (American, British English, Spanish, French, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin). Fast — runs on CPU in real-time. Apache 2.0 license. Simple Python API. Used for local TTS in agents, voice assistants, and content generation. HuggingFace Hub for model download.

gotchas: Limited voice cloning (fixed set of voices, no custom voice injection)
Occasional pronunciation errors on technical terms
best_when: Local TTS for AI agents and voice assistants without API costs
High-quality speech synthesis without ElevenLabs subscription
avoid_when: Custom voice cloning (use ElevenLabs or XTTS)
Production requiring maximum voice naturalness (ElevenLabs still leads)
summary: Kokoro is a state-of-the-art open-source TTS model with only 82M parameters. Remarkably natural voice quality (comparable to ElevenLabs) running on CPU in real-time. Multiple languages and voices. Apache 2.0 license. Fast and lightweight. Best for local TTS in AI agents and voice assistants without API costs. Limited custom voice cloning — use ElevenLabs for that.
